title: Spanish-Style Paella with Green Olives
description: A classic Spanish dish featuring saffron-infused rice, succulent chicken, and briny green olives. Perfect for a dinner party or special occasion.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove from the pan and set aside.
Add the Monsoon spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Add the Dutch yellow rice and stir to coat with the broth.
Return the chicken to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the pan to the oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20-25 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the chicken is cooked through.
Stir in the green olives and moist sea salt.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges if desired.
